title: ICAI CA May 2026 Exams: Late Fee Registration Concludes, Correction Window Now Live!
content:
# ICAI CA May 2026 Exams: Late Fee Registration Concludes, Correction Window Now Live!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne May 2026 CA examinations ke liye major deadlines announce kiye hain, jinke baare mein hum aapko batana chahenge.

*   **Late Fee Registration Closed:** CA May 2026 exams ke liye application submission with late fee ki last date March 19, 2026 (11:59 PM IST) thi, jo ab close ho chuki hai.
*   **Correction Window Open:** Candidates ke liye application form mein changes karne ki correction window aaj, March 20, 2026 (10:00 AM IST) se open ho gayi hai.
*   **Correction Window Closure:** Aap apne application details mein changes March 22, 2026 (11:59 PM IST) tak kar sakte hain.
*   **Application Period:** Online applications March 03, 2026 se shuru hue the, aur without late fee submit karne ki last date March 16, 2026 thi.
*   **Late Fee Details:** Late fee ₹600 (Indian centres ke liye) aur USD 10 (overseas centres ke liye) thi.

Aapko salah di jaati hai ki correction window ka upyog karke apne exam form ki details double-check kar lein aur koi bhi galti ho toh use theek kar lein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Apply or access the official examination portal here](https://eservices.icai.org)

*Published on: 20 March 2026*
